questionHtml: The flywheel is in translational equilibrium. Distinguish between translational equilibrium and rotational equilibrium.
markschemeHtml:
translational equilibrium is when the sum of all the forces on a body is zero ✔

rotational equilibrium is when the sum of all the torques on a body is zero ✔

meta.title: The flywheel is in translational equilibrium. Distinguish between translational equilibrium and rotational equilibrium.
breadcrumbLabels: B.1 – Rigid bodies and rotational dynamics
